rows.name: BOLT Organic Energy Chews
rows.quote: 2.1 oz. Pouch (net wt per pouch, same across flavors). User's 'Bolt Energy Chews' = PROBAR BOLT Organic Energy Chews.

rows.name: GORE-TEX 3L Jacket
rows.quote: Approx. 420g (The weight for size 3). User's 'Goldwin 0 3L' = Goldwin GORE-TEX 3L Jacket (3-layer shell).

rows.name: Camping Pillowcase
rows.quote: Medium camping pillowcase: 2.3 oz (65 g); fits pillows 15-18 in wide. Straps a pillow onto a sleeping pad (the user's 'Pillow Strap - Medium').
